metadata.description: FSI Multi-Agent Demo — subscription-scoped deployment: resource group + Foundry + supporting services + Container Apps.
Short environment/app name; drives resource naming and the resource group name.
Object ID of a user/group to also grant Foundry data-plane access (optional, for portal testing in ai.azure.com).
Model deployment name the hosted agents run on. MUST match one of the names in modelDeployments (below), or the agents will call a deployment that does not exist.
Model deployments to create on the Foundry account. Override to add models or change capacity/region to fit your quota. Keep the agent model (agentModelDeploymentName) in this list.
User-assigned managed identity for the portal and API container apps.
Log Analytics workspace + Application Insights for Foundry tracing and portal telemetry.
Azure AI Foundry account (AI Services) + project + serialized model deployments for the FSI multi-agent demo.
Model deployments to create on the account. Deployed one at a time to avoid concurrent-write conflicts.

properties.description: Multi-agent FSI demo: equity research, IB pitch prep, and PE LBO screening.

metadata.description: Azure Container Registry for the portal and API images.
Storage account with blob containers for generated artifacts and synthetic datasets.
Key Vault for future vendor MCP API keys and connection secrets (RBAC authorization).
Grants a principal data-plane access to the Foundry account for invoking agents.
Grants a principal data-plane access to the Foundry account for invoking agents.
Container Apps environment hosting the FSI portal (frontend) and API (backend).
Container image for the API. Defaults to a placeholder until the real image is pushed.
Container image for the portal. Defaults to a placeholder until the real image is pushed.
